Chat.NotInitialized: Not initialized yet. Are you logged in?
Chat.YtdlpNotFound: yt-dlp not found. Set the path in /media settings.
Chat.ScreenMenuRequiresHousing: The screen settings menu can only be accessed while the 'Edit Furnishings' housing menu is open or you are outdoors.
Chat.Help:
Commands:
 /media — Open settings
 /media twitch <url> — Tune into a Twitch stream
 /media rtmp <url> — Tune into an RTMP stream
 /media play <url> — Play a media URL
 /media stop — Stop current stream
 /media video — Toggle video window
 /media emulate <ip> <session> — Connect to emulation server
 /media screen [place|move|rotate|scale|reset|save] — 3D screen
 /media listen — Tune into a shared stream
 /media cookies — Import cookies from clipboard
 /media ytdlp-update — Update yt-dlp
 /media help — Show this help
Chat.EmulationFailed: Failed to retrieve stream info from emulation server.
Chat.CannotPlayStreamLocked: Cannot play stream: The TV in this room is locked by its owner.
Chat.CannotPlayLocked: Cannot play: The TV in this room is locked by its owner.
Chat.CannotPlaySafeMode: Cannot play: Safe Mode is enabled for outdoor screens. Only verified domains (YouTube, Twitch, Vimeo) are allowed.
Chat.PlayingDirectStream:
Playing direct stream!
Use "/media video" to toggle the video feed.
Use "/media stop" to stop.
Chat.WaitingYtdlp: Waiting for yt-dlp download/update to finish...
Chat.YouTubeBlocked: YouTube blocked the request (bot check). Please configure cookies via VRCVideoCacher or cookies.txt to play YouTube videos!
Chat.BilibiliBlocked: Bilibili rejected the request (412). Open bilibili.com in your browser, export cookies to cookies.txt in the plugin folder, then try again.
Chat.YtdlpFallbackBrowser: yt-dlp failed. Falling back to embedded browser resolver...
Chat.BrowserFoundUrl: Embedded browser successfully found stream URL.
Chat.ResolveFailedDirect: Failed to resolve URL natively. Trying direct playback...
Chat.NowPlayingFooter:
Use "/media video" to toggle the video feed.
Use "/media stop" to stop.
Chat.TwitchHosting: {0} is hosting a stream! Use "/media listen" to tune in.
Chat.CannotShareLocked: Cannot share media: The TV in this room is locked by its owner.
Chat.ShareLocalOnly: {0} (Playing locally only since you are alone).
Chat.ShareFailedOthersAround: {0} Cannot share video because others are around.
Chat.SyncServerOffline: Cannot connect to sync server. It may be offline.
Chat.ServerSyncPlaying: Server Sync: Now playing media loaded by the room owner.
Chat.PlayFailedMultipleAttempts: Failed to play media after multiple attempts.
Chat.ClipboardEmpty: Failed to read clipboard or clipboard was empty.
Chat.CookiesImportFailed: Failed to import cookies from clipboard.
Chat.CookiesInvalidUrl: Clipboard contains a URL, not cookies. Export Netscape-format cookies.txt from your browser.
Chat.CookiesInvalidJson: Clipboard contains JSON, not Netscape cookies. Export cookies in Netscape format.
Chat.CookiesInvalidEmpty: Clipboard does not contain any cookie lines.
Chat.CookiesInvalidFormat: Clipboard text is not valid Netscape cookies format (tab-separated, 7 fields per line).
Chat.CookiesInvalidNoVideoSite: No cookies for supported video sites found (YouTube, Bilibili, Twitch, etc.).
Chat.TvNotOwned: You do not own this TV.
Chat.DmcaCopied: DMCA contact info and URL copied to clipboard.
Chat.NoActiveUrl: No active media URL to copy.
Chat.ScreenHelp:
Screen commands:
 /media screen place — Place screen at your look-at point
 /media screen move <x> <y> <z> — Adjust position
 /media screen rotate <yaw> [pitch] — Set rotation
 /media screen scale <w> <h> — Set size (world units)
 /media screen reset — Return to overlay mode
 /media screen save — Save current placement
Cmd.HelpMessage:
Media Player commands.
 /media — Open settings
 /media twitch <url> — Tune into a Twitch stream
 /media rtmp <url> — Tune into an RTMP stream
 /media play <url> — Play a media URL
 /media stop — Stop current stream
 /media video — Toggle video window
 /media emulate <ip> <session> — Connect to emulation server
Deps.Missing: Missing media dependencies. Click to download.
Deps.Extracting: Extracting dependencies... (This may take a minute)
SettingsWindow.Title: Media Player Settings
Settings.AutoTuneTwitch: Auto-tune into Twitch streams (in residential areas)##autoTuneTwitch
Settings.DefaultVideoOpen: Open video window by default when stream starts##defaultVideoOpen
Settings.TvGlowTooltip: Enables the realistic ambient light that shines on the walls around the TV.
Settings.UiCullingTooltip: When enabled, the TV will render undearneath the games user interface. Disable as a last resort to Reshade ruining the UI buffer.
Settings.StrictUiMasking: Strict UI Masking (AMD Fix / Invisible Drop Shadows)##strictUiMasking
Settings.StrictUiMaskingTooltip: Enable this if you have an AMD card and notice that the TV does not render. UI dropshadows are lost.
Settings.DisableUiBlockTooltip: Allows clicking the TV even if the game UI overlaps it. Useful if your visual mods heavily interfere with UI mask detection.
Settings.WanderersCampfireFix: Enable Wanderer's Campfire Fix (For Modded Campfires)##wanderersCampfireFix
Settings.WanderersCampfireFixTooltip: Enable this if you use modded skybox mods that replace Wanderer's Campfire.
Settings.SafeMode: Safe Mode (Only allow safe domains outside)##safeMode
Settings.SafeModeHint: Blocks unverified URLs on outdoor screens to prevent abuse.
Settings.SafeModeWarning1: WARNING: Disabling Safe Mode will allow almost any domain to play on outdoor screens (unless otherwise blacklisted by your current server).
Settings.SafeModeWarning2: You may be exposed to content that you may not wish to see from unmoderated domains.
Settings.SafeModeAgree1: By clicking 'I Agree', you accept full responsibility for your own screen,
Settings.SafeModeAgree2: and you explicitly agree that you WILL NOT play illegal content.
Settings.SpatialAudioHint: Dynamically pans audio to simulate physical TV locations. If you experience A/V sync issues, disable this.
Settings.SeekIncrementHint: How many seconds the << and >> buttons skip.
Settings.VerboseChatHint: Shows detailed plugin status messages in the chat.
Settings.YtdlpHint: yt-dlp is automatically downloaded and updated.
Settings.NoCookiesBody: YouTube now heavily blocks players without cookies. To fix this, you must install the VRCVideoCacher extension in your browser, which locally syncs your cookie data.
Settings.AutoImportCookies: Auto-import cookies from clipboard every 5 seconds##autoImportCookies
Settings.AutoImportCookiesTooltip: When enabled, the plugin watches the clipboard and automatically imports valid Netscape-format cookies.
Settings.CookiesFound: cookies.txt found and ready to use.
Settings.CookiesManualImportHint: Export Netscape-format cookies from a browser extension (e.g. Get cookies.txt LOCALLY), copy them to the clipboard, then click Import below or use /media cookies.
Settings.ImportCookiesTooltip: Import Netscape-format cookies from the clipboard (same as /media cookies).
Settings.CookiesCommandHint: You can also use /media cookies in chat to import cookies.
Settings.VRCVideoCacherBody: Install the VRCVideoCacher extension and visit YouTube while logged in. Cookies are automatically sent to this plugin on localhost:9696 — no clipboard copy needed.
Settings.VRCVideoCacherListenerInactive: Extension listener inactive. Port 9696 may be in use by another app.
Settings.VRCVideoCacherExtensionTooltip: Opens the VRCVideoCacher cookies exporter for Chrome/Edge/Brave or Firefox.
Settings.ServerUrlHint: URL of the backend server used to sync TVs.
ScreenWindow.Title: Screen Placement
Screen.HousingRequiredBody: To place or sync a screen, please open the 'Indoor Furnishings' menu in-game.
Screen.OutdoorDisabledBody: You must enable 'Enable Outdoor Public Screens' in the main settings menu to place TVs outdoors.
Screen.EnableHint: Enable to place the video in the game world.
Screen.QuickSnapBody: Hold CTRL + SHIFT while hovering over or selecting a furnishing in Edit Mode to instantly snap the TV to it.
Screen.RoomSyncBody: Saving above only saves locally. To make the TV visible to other players, you must sync it to the room.
Screen.MustBeInHousing: You must be inside a housing area or valid outdoor zone to sync TVs.
Screen.CanOverrideLocked: You can override this locked TV because you have privileges here.
Screen.LockedByOwner: This TV is locked by its owner.
Screen.RemovedTv: Successfully removed TV from the room!
Screen.CannotDeleteLocked: Cannot delete TV: It is locked by its owner.
Screen.RegisteredTv: Successfully registered TV for all visitors!
Screen.RegisterFailed: Saved locally, but failed to reach the sync server.
Screen.CannotMoveLocked: Cannot move TV: It is locked by its owner.
VideoWindow.Title: Media Player
Video.Tooltip.Refresh: Re-resolve and replay the current media
Video.DmcaClipboardFormat:
Content URL: {0}

Please contact {1} to report this content.
Video.Tooltip.Dmca: Copy DMCA info & media URL to clipboard
Video.Tooltip.Kill: Kill the media pipeline and restart it
